title: David and Goliath
lessonTheme: We can be brave because God is with us.
summary: A giant warrior named Goliath scared everyone in Israel. A young shepherd boy named David trusted God and stood up to him.

title: The Good Samaritan
lessonTheme: We show love by helping people in need, even when it costs us something.
summary: A man was hurt on the road and needed help. Jesus told this story to show us what it really means to love our neighbor.
